newDate.title: newDate
newDate.description: The new date selected by the user in YYYY-MM-DD format

newSlotLabel.title: newSlotLabel
newSlotLabel.description: The new time slot selected by the user exactly as shown in the list e.g. 10:00 AM - 10:30 AM

testDriveId.title: testDriveId
testDriveId.description: The Salesforce ID of the test drive to reschedule. Stored from the test drive selected by the user.
